card_description: Von Stauffenberg is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick describes a "blissful mystical experience" where he perceives God's activity as a "Tao-istic mechanism" (Ma'at) that re-establishes equilibrium below the surface of evil."
